mapper.select: SELECT id, meter_id, meter_num, tasks_id, instruction_type, instruction, status, instruction_status, send_time, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, create_time FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE meter_id = #{meterId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, meter_id, meter_num, tasks_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, status, instruction_status, send_time, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, out_temp_pj, dtu_num, chan_num, create_time FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE meter_id = #{meterId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
